data.author: Javier Carbajal, Jorge Garay
data.title: NASA Delays Launch of Artemis II Lunar Mission Once Again
data.description: A failure in the helium flow of the SLS rocket has prompted NASA to delay the Artemis II moon mission. Rather than March 6, the launch is now targeted for April.
